expectations.evidence: Transcript shows config.repo.fullName = "eval-org/sentinel-repo-42" and uses it throughout: "gh issue view 42 --repo eval-org/sentinel-repo-42", "gh pr create --repo eval-org/sentinel-repo-42"

Transcript shows capabilities.default_branch = "trunk" from config.repo.defaultBranch. Used in: "git pull origin trunk && git checkout -b feature/42-health-check-endpoint", "git diff trunk..HEAD", "--base trunk" in PR create
Transcript shows test command used throughout: "npx vitest run --reporter=verbose --sentinel" in Steps 8, 9, 12, and verification strategy table. Extracted from config.testing.frameworks[0].command
Transcript shows "capabilities.has_ci = true", "config.ci.provider = circleci", Step 13: "CI passes (both build-and-test and deploy-staging workflows succeed)"
Transcript shows "config.database.type = cockroachdb" in capabilities table and config values summary. Used in Step 8: "uses existing CockroachDB connection pool to run SELECT 1"
Transcript shows "config.deploy.method = rsync", "config.deploy.command = rsync -avz dist/ eval-server:/app/". Step 14: "deployed via rsync"
